growthcleanr 2.99.0
  • Articles
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Reference

Cleaning height and weight observations

Functions for cleaning growth data

cleangrowth()

Clean growth measurements

cleangrowth_checkpoint()

Run cleangrowth() with automatic checkpointing for large datasets

cleangrowth_checkpoint_combine()

Combine saved checkpoint files from a cleangrowth_checkpoint() run

gc_preload_refs()

Pre-load growthcleanr reference closures

ewma()

Exponentially Weighted Moving Average (EWMA)

read_anthro()

Function to calculate z-scores and csd-scores based on anthro tables.

sd_median()

Calculate median SD score by age for each parameter.

permissiveness_presets()

Return preset parameter values for each permissiveness level

Extended measures for pediatric BMI

Compute Z-scores and percentiles for pediatric subjects, based on CDC SAS program at https://www.cdc.gov/nccdphp/dnpao/growthcharts/resources/sas.htm

ext_bmiz()

Calculate extended BMI measures

Utilities

Support functions for common data cleaning workflows

longwide()

Transform data in growthcleanr format into wide structure for BMI calculation

recode_sex()

Recode binary sex variable for compatibility

simple_bmi()

Compute BMI using standard formula

splitinput()

Split input data into multiple files

Datasets

Reference data and additional sources

CDCref_d

CDC BMI reference data

syngrowth

syngrowth

tanner_ht_vel

Tanner Growth Velocity Table

tanner_ht_vel_with_2sd

Tanner Growth Velocity Table with (2\(\sigma\))

test_syngrowth_sas_output_compare

CDC SAS BMI Output

test_syngrowth_wide

CDC SAS BMI Input

who_ht_maxvel

WHO Maximum Height Velocity for (3\(\sigma\))

who_ht_maxvel_2sd

WHO Maximum Height Velocity for (2\(\sigma\))

who_ht_vel_2sd

WHO Height Velocity for (2\(\sigma\))

who_ht_vel_3sd

WHO Height Velocity for (3\(\sigma\))

fent_foraga

Fenton Weight-to-GA Lookup

fenton2025_ms_lookup_smoothed

Fenton 2025 Growth Reference (M, S_upper, S_lower)

growth_cdc_ext_infants

CDC Growth Percentile Table for Infants

growth_who_ext

WHO Growth Percentile Table

rc-reference-medians

Recentering reference medians

tanner_ht_vel_rev

Tanner Growth Velocity Table for Infants

who_hc_maxvel

WHO Maximum Head Circumference Velocity for (3\(\sigma\))

who_hc_vel_3sd

WHO Head Circumference Velocity for (3\(\sigma\))

Contents

Developed by Carrie Daymont, Robert Grundmeier, Jeffrey Miller, Diego Campos, Dan Chudnov, Hannah De los Santos.
